name: Adam Friedland
bio: Adam Friedland is an American stand-up comedian and podcast host who came up in the New York comedy scene. He co-created the podcast Cum Town (2016-2022) before launching The Adam Friedland Show, an interview program modeled on classic late-night talk shows that has drawn praise for its offbeat host persona and avant-garde production. He continues to tour as a stand-up.

timeline.ev: The Adam Friedland Show earns mainstream critical attention
